title: Este Trump un Sulla al republicii americane sau un furuncul trecător?
summary: Anne Applebaum's new preface to 'Autocracy Inc.' describes how Trump has systematically aligned American domestic and foreign policy with autocratic values, attacking democratic allies while embracing kleptocratic practices. The article draws a parallel between Trump's America and the decline of the Roman Republic, asking whether Trump is a temporary anomaly or a Sulla-like figure heralding institutional decay.
talking_points: Trump has shifted US foreign policy away from democratic allies (Ukraine, EU, Canada) while showing leniency toward autocratic regimes (Russia, China, Iran)
Trump and his family have deepened financial entanglements with autocratic regimes through real estate, cryptocurrency ventures, and anonymous shell companies
The firing of 17 inspectors general and Elon Musk's DOGE represent an unprecedented dismantling of institutional oversight and anti-corruption mechanisms
The historical parallel to the Roman Republic's decline suggests Trump may be triggering an irreversible institutional breakdown rather than being a temporary political aberration
The inauguration ceremony became a display of kleptocratic values with tech executives and foreign business partners of the Trump Organization prominently featured
author: Anne Applebaum
